decisions.rationale: Observation refers to MTA New York City Transit. Its base_record_id 'entity_mta-nyct' matches the existing registry record entity_mta-nyct exactly. The observation is an alternative mention of the same agency in the same source document (2013_03_sbs_webster_bx_cb5). Since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, this is new (the observation already resolves to that id).

Observation refers to NYC Department of Transportation. Its base_record_id 'entity_nyc-dot' matches the existing registry record entity_nyc-dot exactly. The observation is an alternative mention of the same agency from the same source document. Since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, this is new (the observation already resolves to that id).

evidence_refs.source_quote: The New York City Department of Transportation logo, which is a small square containing a stylized globe and the text 'NEW YORK CITY' above it.

decisions.rationale: Observation refers to Community Board 5 (Bronx). Its base_record_id 'entity_bronx-cb5-2012-11-webster' matches the existing registry record entity_bronx-cb5-2012-11-webster exactly. The registry record already lists 'entity_bronx-cb5-2013-03-webster' as an alias and includes source_id '2013_03_sbs_webster_bx_cb5'. Since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, this is new.
